description: Create a two-column content slide on the outlook for 2025 in historical context, with survey question text on the left and a two-series line chart of global agreement percentages from 2012 to 2024 on the right.

header.headline: Outlook for 2025 in a historical context

left.body:
Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements...?

Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024

series.name: I am optimistic that next year will be a better year than this year
The global economy will be stronger next year than it was this year
